description_long: This is a floor-standing whiteboard with a rectangular writing surface framed by a metallic structure. The front side features colorful graffiti-style text reading 'GET SKOOL'D' and is decorated with five printed photographs of people, giving it a personalized and informal appearance. The frame is constructed from thin, straight metal bars, providing stability and a modern, minimalist look. The back of the whiteboard is plain, with no visible markings or accessories. The side views reveal the slim profile of both the board and its supporting frame. This object is suitable for use in classrooms, offices, or community spaces in urban environments.
description: A floor-standing, metal-framed whiteboard with graffiti text and photos on the front, featuring a minimalist and modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the whiteboard's writing surface with graffiti text and five photos attached.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the slim profile of the whiteboard and its supporting frame.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain back of the whiteboard with no markings or accessories.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the thinness of the frame and board.
